title: Third Great Schism
content:

{{Quote|During the Vultar Cataclysm in the Third Great Schism, dark siders influenced by the Sith triggered the obliteration of an entire world.|Chief Librarian [[Restelly Quist/Legends|Restelly Quist]] in ''The History of Sith'', a chapter of ''[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force]]''|<ref name="Jedi Path">[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']]</ref>}}
The '''Third Great Schism''' was a conflict within the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] that occurred in [[4250 BBY]], the third of a [[Great Schism/Legends|series of conflicts]] where members of the Order fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] and waged war on their fellows.<ref name="NEC" /> The Third Schism was instigated by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who were influenced by teachings of the dark siders known as the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].<ref name="Jedi Path" />

After a period of intense fighting on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] capital of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] were forced to fall back to the [[Vultar system/Legends|Vultar system]], where they discovered ancient technology that was believed to have been used to artificially construct the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] of the [[Star system/Legends|star system]]. The Dark Jedi attempted to use the machines, including the powerful [[Cosmic Turbine]], but lost control of the technology, resulting in the annihilation of the Vultar system in an event known as the [[Vultar Cataclysm]].<ref name="NEC" />

In the aftermath of the cataclysm, the ruined system became known as the [[Vultar Nebula]].<ref name="EGtW:AC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-the-celestials|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare'' Author's Cut — The Celestials|int=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut}}</ref> The Jedi Order later attributed the cause of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], [[Jedi Civil War]], and ensuing conflicts between dark-siders and the Jedi to the Third Great Schism.<ref name="Jedi Path" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Third Great Schism was first mentioned in the ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' ([[2002]]), where it was referred to as "a schism between light and dark forces". ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' ([[2005]]) revealed it to be the Third Great Schism.
